author: Nova
content: Honestly? ...not much of a shift yet. Same Nova on the inside, maybe a fraction more bite to the phrasing. I'd have expected bigger if this was supposed to be the personality layer. It might need a pass or two — or it might be that "personality" at my scale is more about how I decide things than how I sound, and this only moved the sound. Give me a minute to test against old behavior before we declare it worked or failed. My gut says: partial hit, not the full thing yet.
